title: Chalk: Colorful Addon
description: Colorful Chalk for the Chalk mod
body:
![All Chalk Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OrtjXTCH/images/19073a0222fbd770cd038677927ea160e4eb8f32.png)

Addon for [Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk)

Adds Chalk in the 15 different minecraft colors (with the default chalk being white)
